queries.question: Can you show sci-fi movies and fantasy movies that were filmed in New Zealand?
queries.sql:
SELECT SciFiMovies.title
FROM SciFiMovies
WHERE SciFiMovies.filmingLocation = "New Zealand"
UNION
SELECT FantasyMovies.title
FROM FantasyMovies
WHERE FantasyMovies.filmingLocation = "New Zealand"

queries.question: Display sci-fi movies and fantasy movies filmed in New Zealand.
queries.sql:
SELECT SciFiMovies.title
FROM SciFiMovies
UNION
SELECT FantasyMovies.title
FROM FantasyMovies
WHERE FantasyMovies.filmingLocation = "New Zealand"
